g.text: CI/CD pipeline - GitHub Actions -> GHCR -> DOKS
This syntax is deprecated, you must add <<#FF6961>> at the end of the line, after the ';'
GitHub Actions runs the CI workflow whose
path filter matches the changed files; cd.yml
the in-cluster StatefulSet template is skipped.
`--atomic` -> failed upgrade rolls back to the
previous release. Migration job runs as a
pre-upgrade Helm Hook; if it fails, the chart
rolls back without touching app pods.
